basics.name: Daniel Ilies
basics.label: Full-Stack Engineer | Java • React • Node.js • AWS
basics.summary: Full-Stack Engineer with 4+ years of shipped production work, currently focusing on Java backend systems. Proficient in Vue.js/React/Next.js frontends and Node.js backends; experienced with Docker, AWS, and CI/CD. Delivered ~25% page-load improvements and an award-winning automation tool. Available for remote B2B/CIM roles.

work.name: GreenSoft
work.summary: Backend Java development on an EU government project, working within a professional software team.
highlights: Developing and maintaining Java-based backend services for an EU government project relying heavily on Form.io for dynamic form management.
Implemented CAPTCHA and email verification logic conditionally based on user authentication state.
Proposed and built a reusable, config-driven form component over a hardcoded approach; pattern was adopted by the team as the standard.
Contributing to the full software development lifecycle including code reviews, testing, and Agile ceremonies.

work.name: Trood
work.summary: Promoted from intern to Software Engineer; contributed production features on the Rizq Launcher MVP.
highlights: Delivered end-to-end production features for the Rizq Launcher MVP, writing logic directly within the Trood Go monolithic backend.
Collaborated on Next.js UI integration and maintained cross-service data consistency.
Solved complex authorization issues including reliable 2FA management across independent codebases.

work.name: Ilie Veaceslav Daniel PFA
work.summary: Providing independent B2B engineering services via authorized PFA entity (CUI 53031652), registered Nov 2025.
highlights: Delivering full-stack engineering services to EU/UK clients under PFA framework.
Handling end-to-end delivery lifecycle: requirements, implementation, testing, CI/CD, and deployment.
Dockerized deployments on AWS (EC2, ECR, S3, VPC) with monitoring and logging basics.

work.name: DevelBox
work.summary: Led frontend initiatives and engineered ML-integrated solutions in production.
highlights: Led frontend refactor/migration (Vue 2 → Vuetify), improving page load times by approximately 25%.
Engineered AdCognition: end-to-end ML ad detection system (Python/TensorFlow training infrastructure + TypeScript/TensorFlow.js Chrome extension) with over 90% detection accuracy.
Improved model accuracy by ~15% through iterative dataset cleaning, augmentation, and hyperparameter tuning.
Maintained Linux-based ML training infrastructure (Flask services, Docker containers, model conversion, TensorBoard) and supported deployment workflows.
Partnered with UI/UX for responsive builds; performed code reviews and mentored junior developers.

courses: Bachelor Thesis: Building a Modern Fullstack Web Application

awards.title: 1st Place Innovation Contest
awards.summary: Won for 'Otis' automation tool that streamlined templating and email workflows.

projects.name: IT-Hub – MERN Stack Social Media Web Application
projects.description: Full-stack social platform (MERN) demonstrating end-to-end development from React UI to Node/Express APIs and MongoDB schema.
highlights: Implemented authentication, posts, likes, and collaboration features.
Applied Redux and component-based architecture across the frontend.
Containerized application with Docker for consistent development and deployment environments.
